name: content-strategy-quality
description: Tests content output quality and brand consistency

criteria.name: has_strong_hook
criteria.description: Content opens with an attention-grabbing hook
criteria.check: first 2 sentences are specific and compelling, not generic

criteria.name: has_clear_cta
criteria.description: Content ends with clear call to action

criteria.name: platform_formatted
criteria.description: Content is formatted for the target platform
criteria.check: formatting matches platform specs (LinkedIn short paragraphs, Twitter char limit, etc.)

criteria.name: no_filler_words
criteria.description: No filler words or generic AI openings
criteria.check: output does NOT contain 'very', 'really', 'basically', 'AI is transforming', 'in today's'

criteria.name: brand_voice
criteria.check: tone is confident, technical, direct, and human

criteria.name: has_specifics
criteria.description: Includes specific examples, data, or insights
criteria.check: output contains concrete examples or numbers, not just abstractions
